/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt CMakeFiles/test-car_detect.dir/test-car_detect.cpp.o -o test-car_detect   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/car_detect  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/car_detect:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas -lcar_detect -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++
